cases.name: Business Deck System
cases.purpose: Reference formal business deck structure with cover, section divider, data slide, matrix slide, and conclusion slide.
cases.style: restrained banker-style layout, consistent grid, source-aware charts, clear title hierarchy
disabled_when: template-following requires a supplied source deck
cases.notes: Use the Presentations route for formal editable PPTX when available; local PptxGenJS remains a fallback.
